name: Z Tejas' Chile Fudge Pie
recipeInstructions:
For ancho puree: Ancho chiles, which are dried poblanos, are found in the produce section. Remove seeds and stem from one ancho chili pepper. Place the chili in a small saucepan with water to cover. Bring to a boil and simmer until the chili is tender. Puree in a food processor.
Melt butter and let cool to warm. Toast pecans and walnuts until lightly brown. Beat eggs well, then add sugars and flour. Beat until smooth. Add warm butter and mix well. (It is important for butter to be warm so chocolate chips will melt some.) Add ancho puree. Stir in nuts and chocolate chips. Pour filling into pastry shell and bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 to 60 minutes, or until done.
